Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend And Testify At Deposition And For An Order Imposing Sanctions Against Plaintiff
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JACKSON ACHORN, ASV EQ 1, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Attend And Testify At Deposition And For An Order Imposing Sanctions Against Plaintiff.

Motion is granted. No opposition filed.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling by e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem Andy Schwartz at schwartz@cmslaw.com

Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, And For An Order Imposing Sanctions Against Plaintiff (Motions)
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JACKSON ACHORN, ASV EQ 1, LLC'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Request For Production Of Documents, And For An Order Imposing Sanctions Against Plaintiff.

Motion is granted. No opposition filed.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling by e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem Andy Schwartz at schwartz@cmslaw.com

Judge Pro Tem: Andy Schwartz; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
